name: Godiva Strawberry Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in water and set aside.
2. In a double boiler, cook egg yolks, sugar, salt, and scalded milk until slightly thickened, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat, add softened gelatin and stir until dissolved.
4. Add vanilla, strawberry puree, and 1 1/2 cups Godiva Liqueur; chill until slightly thickened and the mixture mounds on a spoon.
5. Whip cream until stiff and fold into strawberry mixture; set aside.
6. Place sponge cake in a greased 9-inch springform pan.
7. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup Godiva Liqueur, cover with whole strawberries (hulled side down), and top with strawberry mousse mixture.
8. Refrigerate several hours before serving.
9. Garnish with whipped cream and fresh strawberries.
